<SENTENCA>select tnfe.*, f.nomefantasia from TNFEENTRADA tnfe left join fcfo f on tnfe.codcoligada = f.codcoligada and tnfe.codcfo = f.codcfo</SENTENCA> <TAMANHO>133</TAMANHO>
